test_description: Compare the current excerpt with no linked hadith versus the same excerpt with an exact linked hadith openable nearby.
what_it_is_trying_to_expose: Whether the excerpt’s current partial benefit is being mistaken for safe study design.
why_this_test_matters: It directly measures the owner’s stated distinction between partial benefit and acceptable design.

test_description: Compare owner mental-memory linkage against a documented library reference link.
what_it_is_trying_to_expose: Whether undocumented mental recall is being wrongly treated as enough.
why_this_test_matters: The owner explicitly rejects relying on his memory as a library solution.

test_description: Present the owner with the explanation but make the linked proof a different version of the same hadith family.
why_this_test_matters: This is one of the owner’s stated catastrophe scenarios.

test_description: Compare a design that only says earlier material exists versus one that provides an openable exact proof.
what_it_is_trying_to_expose: Whether note-only support is being overrated.
why_this_test_matters: The follow-up question of SC2 directly turns on this distinction.

test_description: Test chunk-by-chunk study of the explanation with and without close proof access.
what_it_is_trying_to_expose: Breakdown of the owner’s study flow when proof proximity is weak.
why_this_test_matters: The owner explicitly describes his chunk-study process as requiring repeated proof checks.

test_description: Run the pipeline with and without a passage-analysis gate that resolves reference-back dependencies before excerpting.
what_it_is_trying_to_expose: Quality loss from skipping too quickly from passaging to excerpting.
why_this_test_matters: The owner marks this as a major missing piece in the pipeline.

test_description: Force the owner to leave the excerpt and manually search for the earlier hadith in order to proceed.
what_it_is_trying_to_expose: Manhunt risk under real study conditions.
why_this_test_matters: The owner calls this directly against the self-containment principle.

test_description: Compare always-visible side-by-side proof blocking vision versus openable nearby proof reference.
what_it_is_trying_to_expose: Whether proof proximity can be achieved without overloading visual space.
why_this_test_matters: The owner explicitly says he does not need the proof permanently blocking his vision.

test_description: Replace the exact comparison target (حديث عثمان السابق) with a generic topic link to wudu proofs.
what_it_is_trying_to_expose: Loss of the exact comparative reference the explanation depends on.
why_this_test_matters: The excerpt repeatedly compares with a specific previous hadith, not with the topic in general.
